raw_consumer_statement:
This is a supplemental submission to my existing CFPB complaint ( XXXX XXXX. XXXX ) regarding an unresolved missing refund from American Express .. Please associate this information with the existing case.

After reviewing American Expresss response, I would like to clarify the core issue, as the transactions alone may not fully reflect the outstanding balance.

Although multiple transactions appear on my accountincluding a refund, a dispute credit, and a subsequent reversalthe net result is that I have only received one actual refund for two separate cancelled hotel nights.

Specifically : I cancelled two hotel nights, each eligible for a refund of {$500.00}. 

Only XXXX refund of {$500.00} has been successfully received. 

A dispute credit that was applied to address the missing refund was later reversed ( rebilled ), effectively canceling it out. 

As a result, I am still missing one refund of {$500.00}.

The issue is not the presence of individual transactions, but rather that the overall reconciliation of charges and credits does not reflect the full refund owed.

I respectfully request that CFPB assist in ensuring a full and proper reconciliation of all related transactions and that American Express issues the remaining refund of {$500.00}.

Please let me know if any additional documentation is needed.

Thank you for your assistance. 

Sincerely, XXXX
